ticket_decisions.outage_id: string; empty string when none applies
ticket_decisions.escalation_team: enum: NONE | TIER2_SUPPORT | FIELD_OPS | NETWORK_ENGINEERING | ACCOUNTS_PAYABLE
ticket_decisions.resolution_route: enum: AUTO_TROUBLESHOOTING | OUTAGE_WAIT | ESCALATION | INELIGIBLE_ACCOUNT | AUTH_FAILED | INVALID_ACCOUNT

evidence_audit.unique_escalation_teams: list of enum values sorted alphabetically; allowed values FIELD_OPS | NETWORK_ENGINEERING | TIER2_SUPPORT
evidence_audit.pre_troubleshooting_bandwidth_gap_total_: number with one decimal; sum of support-convention pre-diagnostic bandwidth shortfalls for tickets where diagnostics are used
evidence_audit.post_troubleshooting_remaining_issue_fla: integer; total latency/stability/bandwidth flags still failing after troubleshooting across escalated tickets

metric_threshold_audit.diagnostic_records_skipped_by_gate: integer; target tickets with diagnostic records present but skipped because an earlier account/outage gate decides the outcome
metric_threshold_audit.tickets_below_pre_bandwidth_threshold: list of target ticket IDs sorted ascending that fail the support bandwidth convention before troubleshooting and are not skipped by an earlier gate
metric_threshold_audit.post_troubleshooting_success_ticket_ids: list of target ticket IDs sorted ascending that pass all support diagnostic conventions after troubleshooting
metric_threshold_audit.post_troubleshooting_failure_ticket_ids: list of target ticket IDs sorted ascending that still fail any support diagnostic convention after troubleshooting

root_cause_escalation_ticket_ids.FIELD_OPS: list of target ticket IDs sorted ascending whose root cause maps to field operations
root_cause_escalation_ticket_ids.NETWORK_ENGINEERING: list of target ticket IDs sorted ascending whose root cause maps to network engineering
root_cause_escalation_ticket_ids.TIER2_SUPPORT: list of target ticket IDs sorted ascending whose root cause maps to tier-2 support

metric_threshold_audit.diagnostic_bandwidth_floor_mbps_by_ticke: list of objects sorted by ticket_id for diagnostics-used target tickets; each object has ticket_id and floor_mbps under the learned support convention
metric_threshold_audit.pre_bandwidth_shortfall_mbps_by_ticket: list of objects sorted by ticket_id for diagnostics-used target tickets below the support bandwidth floor; each object has ticket_id and shortfall_mbps to one decimal
metric_threshold_audit.post_remaining_issue_flags_by_ticket: list of objects sorted by ticket_id for diagnostics-used target tickets; each object has ticket_id and remaining_issue_flags after troubleshooting

post_threshold_excess_totals.latency_ms: number with one decimal; total post-troubleshooting latency excess above the support convention across unresolved diagnostic tickets
post_threshold_excess_totals.jitter_ms: number with one decimal; total post-troubleshooting jitter excess above the support convention across unresolved diagnostic tickets
post_threshold_excess_totals.bandwidth_mbps: number with one decimal; total post-troubleshooting bandwidth shortfall below the support convention across unresolved diagnostic tickets
